summary: Iteration 57 - Comprehensive E-commerce Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Tested all major flows including homepage, products, login flows for all 4 account types, dashboards, floating island functionality, internal chat, add to cart. Key finding: Influencer dashboard 'not an influencer' bug is FIXED - dashboard loads correctly with data.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection still failing (infrastructure/ingress issue) - REST fallback works

issues: Some product images are missing (showing placeholder icons)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/influencer/dashboard - PASS (CRITICAL: 'not an influencer' bug FIXED)
Frontend: Homepage loads with floating island visible - PASS
Frontend: Products page loads (13 products) - PASS
Frontend: Customer login -> customer dashboard - PASS
Frontend: Producer login -> producer dashboard - PASS
Frontend: Influencer login -> influencer dashboard (NO 'not an influencer' error!) - PASS
Frontend: Admin login -> super-admin dashboard - PASS
Frontend: Floating island visible on public pages - PASS
Frontend: Floating island visible on dashboard pages - PASS
Frontend: Floating island expands with labeled tools - PASS
Frontend: Mensajes tool visible when logged in - PASS
Frontend: Hispalo AI tool visible - PASS
Frontend: Internal chat opens with directory tabs (Influencers, Vendedores, Chats) - PASS
Frontend: Add to cart shows 'Added successfully' toast - PASS
Frontend: Stores page loads with 2 stores - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Influencer dashboard double /api prefix bug has been FIXED - API calls now work correctly
UnifiedFloatingIsland component properly shows/hides based on auth state and page location
InternalChat directory tabs working correctly - shows influencers and producers
All 4 login flows (customer, producer, influencer, admin) working correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 completed comprehensive A-Z testing. All login flows work. Influencer dashboard 'not an influencer' bug is CONFIRMED FIXED. Floating island works on all pages (except auth pages by design). Internal chat opens correctly with directory tabs. Add to cart works. WebSocket still has infrastructure issues but REST fallback works. All 18 backend API tests pass.

rca_of_issue.issue: Influencer dashboard 'not an influencer' bug - RESOLVED
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Previous iterations identified this was caused by double /api prefix in URL (utils/api already includes /api, so calling `${API}/api/influencer/dashboard` resulted in /api/api/influencer/dashboard)
rca_of_issue.fix_verification: Tested influencer login flow - dashboard now loads correctly with influencer data (Total Sales €0, Total Earned €0, Available Balance €0, Commission Rate 10%). No 'not an influencer' error appears.
